raw_consumer_statement:
I am seeking a full refund for an unauthorized {$190.00} renewal charge levied on XX/XX/XXXX on my Citi Card. This charge occurred despite my explicit cancellation of service XXXX months prior. Following the charge, I was subjected to repeated failures by XXXX 's customer support, which I documented, and a profound lack of safeguard from my financial institution ( Citicard ) during the dispute process, leading to the charge remaining unresolved. 

Chronology of Events Date Event Details XX/XX/XXXX Initial Payment Paid {$190.00} for the Pro Annual Plan. 


XX/XX/XXXX Initial Payment I officially cancelled my XXXX account on this date. 


XX/XX/XXXX Disputed Charge Posted An unauthorized {$190.00} renewal charge was posted by XXXX to my Citicard account. 

XXXX XXXX Initial Resolution Attempts I made " XXXX '' number of attempts ( calls/emails ) to XXXX to resolve this charge, but received no resolution. 


Subsequent Dates Failed Dispute Process ( Citicard ) I initiated a formal transaction dispute with my bank ( Citicard ) almost three times. I provided detailed evidence of my cancellation and past service escalations/misconduct documentation. Citicard has demonstrated incompetence and a failure to protect my rights or finalize the charge reversal despite conclusive evidence. 


As evidence of XXXX 's lack of support and refusal to resolve the issue in good faith, I provided complete documentation, including email attachments, screenshots of the cancellation and refund process, all of which were ignored by Citi team.
